mapper.sql: id, TradeCompanyId, ROrderNo, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, CustomerNo, UserNo, DlvEntire, Amount, TaxAmount, NTaxAmount, InvFlag, OptDate, OptCode, ClassFlag, InvoiceNo, InvDate, OptState, StockNo, InvFlag1, ProdFlag, BillNo, Username, OptTime, Receive_Emp, Receive_Cust, Receive_date, Receive_Remark, Receive_OptState, PurchaseNo, AgentPrice_Flag, DeptNo, DiscountAmt, OrdType, invoicecode, invtype, InvoiceNo_Jp, TaxRate, NTaxDiscountAmt, TaxDiscountAmt, InsertTime, CancelDate, Extracted, ExtractTime, InvoiceGroupKey, Remark, expdate, ackdate, orderno, itemno
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.SalesInvoice
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.SalesInvoice (id, TradeCompanyId, ROrderNo, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, CustomerNo, UserNo, DlvEntire, Amount, TaxAmount, NTaxAmount, InvFlag, OptDate, OptCode, ClassFlag, mapper.update:
update dbo.SalesInvoice
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TradeCompanyId = #{record.tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvEntire = #{record.dlventire,jdbcType=CHAR},
Amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TaxAmount = #{record.taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
NTaxAmount = #{record.ntaxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
InvFlag = #{record.invflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptDate = #{record.optdate,jdbcType=DATE},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ClassFlag = #{record.classflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvDate = #{record.invdate,jdbcType=DATE},
OptState = #{record.optstate,jdbcType=CHAR},
StockNo = #{record.stockno,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvFlag1 = #{record.invflag1,jdbcType=CHAR},
ProdFlag = #{record.prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
BillNo = #{record.billno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Username = #{record.username,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Receive_Emp = #{record.receiveEmp,jdbcType=CHAR},
Receive_Cust = #{record.receiveCust,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Receive_date = #{record.receiveDate,jdbcType=DATE},
Receive_Remark = #{record.receiveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Receive_OptState = #{record.receiveOptstate,jdbcType=CHAR},
PurchaseNo = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AgentPrice_Flag = #{record.agentpriceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DiscountAmt = #{record.discountamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
invoicecode = #{record.invoicecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
invtype = #{record.invtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvoiceNo_Jp = #{record.invoicenoJp,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TaxRate = #{record.taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
NTaxDiscountAmt = #{record.ntaxdiscountamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TaxDiscountAmt = #{record.taxdiscountamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
InsertTime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CancelDate = #{record.canceldate,jdbcType=DATE},
Extracted = #{record.extracted,jdbcType=CHAR},
ExtractTime = #{record.extracttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InvoiceGroupKey = #{record.invoicegroupkey,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expdate = #{record.expdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ackdate = #{record.ackdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orderno = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemno = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.SalesInvoice
TradeCompanyId = #{tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrderNo = #{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvEntire = #{dlventire,jdbcType=CHAR},
Amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TaxAmount = #{taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
NTaxAmount = #{ntaxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
InvFlag = #{invflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptDate = #{optdate,jdbcType=DATE},
OptCode = #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ClassFlag = #{classflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvDate = #{invdate,jdbcType=DATE},
OptState = #{optstate,jdbcType=CHAR},
StockNo = #{stockno,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvFlag1 = #{invflag1,jdbcType=CHAR},
ProdFlag = #{prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
BillNo = #{billno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Username = #{username,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptTime = #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Receive_Emp = #{receiveEmp,jdbcType=CHAR},
Receive_Cust = #{receiveCust,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Receive_date = #{receiveDate,jdbcType=DATE},
Receive_Remark = #{receiveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Receive_OptState = #{receiveOptstate,jdbcType=CHAR},
PurchaseNo = #{purchaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AgentPrice_Flag = #{agentpriceFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DiscountAmt = #{discountamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
OrdType = #{ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
invoicecode = #{invoicecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
invtype = #{invtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvoiceNo_Jp = #{invoicenoJp,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TaxRate = #{taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
NTaxDiscountAmt = #{ntaxdiscountamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TaxDiscountAmt = #{taxdiscountamt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
InsertTime = #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CancelDate = #{canceldate,jdbcType=DATE},
Extracted = #{extracted,jdbcType=CHAR},
ExtractTime = #{extracttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InvoiceGroupKey = #{invoicegroupkey,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expdate = #{expdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ackdate = #{ackdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orderno = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemno = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
